subject: Cloud Computing
title: AI as a Cloud Service
description: Learn AI as a Cloud Service in one minute.

hook.text: You don't need to train your own AI. Cloud APIs add vision, language, and prediction to any app with one API call.

buildup.text: AWS Rekognition, Google Vision, Azure Cognitive Services — pre-trained models available as pay-per-call APIs.

discovery.text: MLaaS democratizes AI. A startup with no data scientists can add image recognition in an hour using cloud APIs.

twist.text: But pre-trained models have biases baked in. If the training data was biased, every API call amplifies that bias.

climax.text: AI-as-a-service is powerful but needs responsible use. Understanding what the model can and can't do is still your job.

punchline.text: One API call adds AI to your app. Understanding it is on you.

quiz.question: What is a key risk of using pre-trained AI cloud APIs?
options: The underlying models may have biases from their training data
AI APIs always produce incorrect results
AI cloud APIs are too expensive for any practical use
